columns.name: category_id
columns.description: Primary key for category; UPSERT merge key for full daily reload

columns.name: category_name
columns.description: Display name of the category

columns.name: description
columns.description: Long-form category description

columns.name: parent_category_id
columns.description: Self-referential FK to category_id; null for root categories

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Record creation timestamp; partition column (MONTH granularity)

columns.name: supplier_id
columns.description: Primary key for supplier; UPSERT merge key for full daily reload

columns.name: supplier_name
columns.description: Legal or trading name of the supplier

columns.name: contact_email
columns.description: Primary contact email address for supplier

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country of supplier operation; secondary cluster column

columns.name: is_active
columns.description: Active status flag for supplier

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Record creation timestamp; partition column (MONTH granularity)

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Primary key for product; UPSERT merge key for daily incremental load

columns.name: product_name
columns.description: Display name of the product

columns.name: sku
columns.description: Stock-keeping unit; business-level unique identifier

columns.name: category_id
columns.description: FK to stg_categories; primary cluster column for category-level reporting

columns.name: supplier_id
columns.description: FK to stg_suppliers; secondary cluster column for supplier-level reporting

columns.name: unit_price
columns.description: Unit selling price; NUMERIC preserved for decimal precision

columns.name: description
columns.description: Long-form product description

columns.name: is_active
columns.description: Active status flag; tertiary cluster column for active-product filtering

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Record creation timestamp

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Last update timestamp; partition column (DAY granularity) and incremental watermark

columns.name: inventory_id
columns.description: Primary key for inventory record; UPSERT merge key for daily incremental load

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: FK to stg_products; primary cluster column for product-level inventory queries

columns.name: warehouse_code
columns.description: Warehouse location identifier; secondary cluster column

columns.name: quantity_on_hand
columns.description: Current stock quantity at warehouse; key metric for inventory trend analysis

columns.name: reorder_level
columns.description: Minimum quantity threshold triggering replenishment

columns.name: last_restocked_date
columns.description: Date of most recent stock replenishment event

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Record creation timestamp

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Last update timestamp; partition column (DAY granularity) and incremental watermark

cardinality.notes: Many products can belong to one category; category_id is nullable in products allowing uncategorised records
Many products can be sourced from one supplier; supplier_id is nullable allowing supplier-unassigned products
Multiple inventory records exist per product (one per warehouse_code); product_id is NOT NULL enforcing referential integrity
Categories form a hierarchy via parent_category_id; root categories carry NULL in parent_category_id
